org.mockito.plugins

Interface MemberAccessor


  • public interface MemberAccessor
    A member accessor is responsible for invoking methods, constructors and for setting and reading field values.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  MemberAccessor.ConstructionDispatcher 
      static interface  MemberAccessor.OnConstruction
